feed.title: Azure Architecture Center
feed.subtitle: Updated articles for Azure Architecture Center

entry.title: Modern Web App Pattern for .NET
entry.summary: Implement the Modern Web App pattern for .NET. Modernize web apps in the cloud by using prescriptive architecture, code, and configuration guidance.

entry.title: Rate Limiting Pattern
entry.summary: Control the rate at which your application sends requests to a service so that you stay within the service's throttling limits and overall capacity.

entry.title: High Availability for Multitier AKS Applications
entry.summary: Read about high availability for multitier application deployment in AKS clusters. Includes a checklist to identify and eliminate points of failure.

entry.title: SD-WAN Integration with Azure Hub-and-Spoke Network Topologies
entry.summary: Learn how to integrate SD-WAN with Azure hub-and-spoke networks by using Route Server, ExpressRoute, and network virtual appliances (NVAs) for hybrid connectivity.

entry.title: Queue-Based Load Leveling Pattern
entry.summary: Learn how to smooth intermittent heavy loads by using a queue that acts as a buffer between a task and the service that it invokes.

entry.title: Caching Guidance
entry.summary: Learn how caching can improve the performance and scalability of a system by copying frequently accessed data to fast storage close to the application.

entry.title: Best Practices for Monitoring and Diagnostics
entry.summary: Learn how to track how customers use your distributed applications and services, trace resource utilization, and monitor health and performance.

entry.title: Gatekeeper Pattern
entry.summary: Learn how to use the Gatekeeper pattern to protect applications and services by using a dedicated host instance as a broker to validate requests and data.

entry.title: Gateway Aggregation Pattern
entry.summary: Learn about the Gateway Aggregation pattern, which uses a gateway to aggregate many individual requests into a single request.

entry.title: Connect Azure Databricks to the Reference Solution
entry.summary: Learn how to ingest and analyze OPC UA PubSub industrial IoT data in Azure Databricks using Delta Lake and Structured Streaming.

entry.title: Connect Microsoft Fabric to the Reference Solution
entry.summary: Learn how to ingest and analyze OPC UA PubSub industrial IoT data using Microsoft Fabric and KQL databases.

entry.title: Connect an on-premises SAP system to Azure
entry.summary: Step by step guide that shows how to connect an on-premises SAP Enterprise Resource Planning system to Azure.

entry.title: Enable an industrial dataspace on Azure
entry.summary: Step by step guide that shows how to enable an industrial dataspace on Azure based on open-source reference implementations.

entry.title: Azure industrial IoT reference solution architecture
entry.summary: Industrial IoT reference solution architecture for condition monitoring, overall equipment effectiveness (OEE) calculation, forecasting, and anomaly detection.

entry.title: Polyglot Persistence with Azure Cosmos DB and Azure SQL Database
entry.summary: Learn how to use Azure Cosmos DB and Azure SQL Database together in a polyglot persistence architecture that assigns each workload to its best-fit database.

entry.title: Strangler Fig Pattern
entry.summary: Learn how to incrementally migrate a legacy system by gradually replacing specific pieces of functionality with new applications and services.

entry.title: Choose a Kubernetes at the Edge Compute Option
entry.summary: Learn about trade-offs and considerations for various Kubernetes options available for extending compute on the edge.

entry.title: Run SAP BW/4HANA with Linux Virtual Machines
entry.summary: Learn about the SAP BW/4HANA application tier and how it's suitable for a high availability, small-scale production environment of SAP BW/4HANA on Azure.

entry.title: Compare AWS and Azure Accounts
entry.summary: Learn the differences between Azure and AWS accounts and subscriptions. Understand the types of administrator accounts in Azure.

entry.title: Baseline Microsoft Foundry Chat Reference Architecture
entry.summary: Learn how to build network-secured, highly available, and zone-redundant enterprise chat applications by using Microsoft Foundry tools and Azure App Service.

entry.title: Baseline Microsoft Foundry Chat Reference Architecture in an Azure Landing Zone
entry.summary: Learn about deploying the baseline Microsoft Foundry, Foundry Agent Service, Azure OpenAI in Foundry Models, and Azure App Service chat architecture in an Azure landing zone.

entry.title: Design a Secure Research Environment for Regulated Data
entry.summary: Learn how to design an architecture on Azure for a regulated environment that allows researchers to access sensitive data.

entry.title: Develop a RAG Solution - Chunking Phase
entry.summary: Learn about the various chunking strategies, like boundary based, custom code, and document analysis models.

entry.title: Develop a RAG Solution - Chunk Enrichment Phase
entry.summary: Learn how to augment your chunks with metadata like title, summary, keywords, and entities, and learn common cleaning methods that can improve vector matches.

entry.title: Develop a RAG Solution - Generate Embeddings Phase
entry.summary: Learn how embeddings work, how to choose an embedding model, and how your embedding model can affect your vector search results.

entry.title: Choose an Analytical Data Store in Azure
entry.summary: Evaluate analytical data store options for big data by reviewing key selection criteria and a capability matrix to compare database models and features.

entry.title: Deploy AD DS in an Azure Virtual Network
entry.summary: Learn how to extend an on-premises Active Directory domain to Azure to provide distributed authentication services in hybrid cloud environments.

entry.title: Build a Conversation Knowledge Mining Solution by using Foundry Tools
entry.summary: Learn how to design a scalable conversation analytics system that extracts insights from conversational data by using Foundry Tools and Microsoft Foundry.

entry.title: Build a Multiple-Agent Workflow Automation Solution by using Microsoft Agent Framework
entry.summary: Learn how to design and deploy scalable multi‑agent automation infrastructure by using Microsoft Agent Framework, Azure Container Apps, and Foundry Tools.

entry.title: Use Azure Databricks to Orchestrate MLOps
entry.summary: Learn about an approach for machine learning operations (MLOps) that uses Azure Databricks to run model training and batch scoring.

entry.title: Esri ArcGIS Platform on Azure Virtual Desktop
entry.summary: View a reference architecture that shows how to deploy ArcGIS Pro in Azure Virtual Desktop to support the hyperscale of Azure.

entry.title: Real-Time Analytics with Azure Service Bus and Microsoft Fabric
entry.summary: Learn how to use Microsoft Fabric with Azure Service Bus for near real-time solutions at enterprise scale in production environments.

entry.title: Use AI to Forecast Customer Orders
entry.summary: Learn how to use AI and machine learning to forecast a customer's future order quantity for a specific SKU. See the Azure services that you can use in this solution.

entry.title: Build ETL pipelines with Azure Databricks and Delta Lake
entry.summary: Create ETL pipelines for batch and streaming data with Azure Databricks to simplify data lake ingestion at any scale.

entry.title: Use Teamcenter PLM with Azure NetApp Files
entry.summary: Learn how to use Azure NetApp Files as a storage solution for Siemens Teamcenter product lifecycle management (PLM).

entry.title: Create a Modern Analytics Architecture by Using Azure Databricks
entry.summary: Learn how to create a modern analytics architecture by using Azure Databricks and Data Lake Storage. Unify data, analytics, and AI workloads at any scale.

entry.title: Modern Data Platform Architecture for SMBs
entry.summary: Use Microsoft Fabric and Azure Databricks to build a modern data platform architecture designed for small and medium businesses.

entry.title: Extract text from objects using Power Automate and AI Builder
entry.summary: Use AI Builder and Azure Document Intelligence in Foundry Tools in a Power Automate workflow to extract text from images, for indexing and retrieval.

entry.title: Computer Forensics Chain of Custody in Azure
entry.summary: Learn how to create an infrastructure and workflow to help ensure a valid digital evidence chain of custody (CoC) for computer forensics in Azure.

entry.title: AKS baseline for multiregion clusters
entry.summary: Run Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) cluster in multiple regions to achieve high availability.

entry.title: Windows 365 Azure Network Connection
entry.summary: Design and implement Windows 365 Azure network connections to integrate Cloud PCs with your existing network infrastructure and on-premises resources.

entry.title: Analytics End-to-End with Microsoft Fabric
entry.summary: Learn how to use Microsoft data services to build a modern analytics platform capable of handling the most common data challenges in an organization.

entry.title: Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) - Planning
entry.summary: Learn how to plan, design, and operate Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) clusters, from foundational concepts to production-ready baseline implementations.

entry.title: Storage Options for a Kubernetes Cluster
entry.summary: Understand storage options for a Kubernetes cluster, and compare Amazon EKS and Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) storage options.

entry.title: Automate Document Classification in Azure
entry.summary: Learn how to use the durable functions feature of Azure Functions as an automated document processing pipeline to classify documents by type.

entry.title: Deploy IBM Maximo Application Suite (MAS) on Azure
entry.summary: Learn how to run IBM Maximo Application Suite (MAS) on Azure. See guidance for designing and implementing cloud solutions with MAS 8.5 and up that use Azure.

entry.title: Use Azure Firewall to help protect an AKS cluster
entry.summary: Deploy an AKS cluster in a hub-and-spoke network topology by using Terraform and Azure DevOps. Help protect inbound and outbound traffic by using Azure Firewall.

entry.title: Cloud Design Patterns
entry.summary: Learn about design patterns for building reliable, scalable, and more secure applications in the cloud with examples based on Microsoft Azure.

entry.title: Migrate IBM z/OS OLTP Workloads to Azure
entry.summary: Migrate a z/OS online transaction processing (OLTP) workload to an Azure application that is cost effective, responsive, scalable, and adaptable.

entry.title: Integrate IBM mainframe and midrange message queues with Azure
entry.summary: This example describes a data-first approach to middleware integration that enables IBM message queues (MQs).

entry.title: Replicate and Sync Mainframe Data to Azure
entry.summary: Learn how to replicate data while you modernize mainframe and midrange systems. Sync on-premises data with Azure data during modernization.

entry.title: Mainframe File Replication and Sync on Azure
entry.summary: Learn about several options for moving, converting, transforming, and storing mainframe and midrange file system data on-premises and in Azure.

entry.title: Multitenancy and Azure SQL Database
entry.summary: This article outlines Azure SQL Database features for designing a multitenant system and provides guidance and examples for using Azure SQL in multitenant solutions.

entry.title: Basic Microsoft Foundry Chat Reference Architecture
entry.summary: Establish foundational knowledge for how to build and deploy enterprise chat applications by using Microsoft Foundry and Azure App Service.

entry.title: Compare AWS and Azure Compute Services
entry.summary: Compare the compute services in Azure and Amazon Web Services (AWS). Explore the differences in virtual machines (VMs), containers, and serverless technologies.

entry.title: Baseline Architecture for an AKS Cluster
entry.summary: Learn about the reference architecture for the recommended baseline infrastructure that deploys an Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) cluster.

entry.title: Anti-Corruption Layer Pattern
entry.summary: Learn about the Anti-Corruption Layer pattern. Implement a facade or adapter layer between a modern application and a legacy system.

entry.title: Build the Second Layer of Defense by Using Microsoft Defender XDR
entry.summary: Enhance security in your IT environment by implementing Microsoft Defender XDR across applications and infrastructure to detect and respond to ransomware.

entry.title: Throttling Pattern
entry.summary: Control the resources that an application instance, tenant, or service consumes so that the system continues to meet service-level objectives (SLOs) under load.

entry.title: SAP Landscape Architecture
entry.summary: Best practices and recommendations for architecting an entire SAP landscape on Azure.

entry.title: CI/CD for Microservices
entry.summary: Learn about continuous integration and continuous delivery (CI/CD) for microservices, including challenges and recommended approaches.

entry.title: Azure Governance Visualizer Deployment Guidance
entry.summary: Analyze and streamline cloud governance for compliance and operational insights across your organization by using Azure Governance Visualizer.

entry.title: Inbound and Outbound Internet Connections for SAP on Azure
entry.summary: Learn proven practices for enabling improved-security inbound and outbound internet connections for your SAP on Azure infrastructure.

entry.title: Use a Gateway in Front of Multiple Azure OpenAI Deployments or Instances
entry.summary: Learn how to add a gateway in front of multiple Azure OpenAI model deployments or instances.

entry.title: Use Deployment Scripts to Check Resource Properties
entry.summary: Use Bicep and a deployment script to pause a deployment until a resource property returns a specific value.

entry.title: Dynamic AI Agents at Scale Pattern
entry.summary: Learn how to dynamically select and orchestrate AI agents from a pool by using Microsoft Foundry, Azure AI Search, and Azure OpenAI to build multiagent systems.

entry.title: Automate API Deployments by Using APIOps
entry.summary: Use APIOps and Azure API Management to build and deploy APIs. This solution provides self-service tools, auditing, policy enforcement, and early feedback.

entry.title: Build the First Layer of Defense by Using Azure Security Services
entry.summary: Secure your IT environment by using Azure security services and Azure Security Benchmark. This article is part of a series.

entry.title: IoT Analytics with Azure Data Explorer and Azure IoT Hub
entry.summary: Use Azure Data Explorer with Azure IoT Hub for near real-time IoT data analytics on fast-flowing, high-volume streaming data from a wide range of IoT devices.

entry.title: WordPress on App Service
entry.summary: Learn how to use Azure Front Door, Azure App Service, and other Azure services to deploy a highly scalable and secure installation of WordPress.

entry.title: WordPress on Azure Kubernetes Service
entry.summary: Learn how to use Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) to deploy a highly scalable and secure installation of WordPress for large, storage-intensive applications.

entry.title: Azure for AWS Professionals
entry.summary: Learn about the basics of the Microsoft Azure platform, accounts, and services. Discover key similarities and differences between the AWS and Azure platforms.

entry.title: Data partitioning strategies
entry.summary: View guidance on separating data partitions to be managed and accessed separately in different services, such as Azure AI Search, Azure storage queues, and more.

entry.title: Azure Files Accessed from On-Premises and Secured by AD DS in a Private Network
entry.summary: Learn how to provide on-premises access to Azure Files with security provided by on-premises Windows Server Active Directory Domain Services (AD DS).

entry.title: Implement a secure hybrid network
entry.summary: Learn how to deploy a secure hybrid network that extends an on-premises network to Azure by implementing a perimeter network called a DMZ.

entry.title: Minimal Storage – Change Feed to Replicate Data
entry.summary: Architecture for a high-availability solution that uses two Azure storage services, one for quick access to high-demand data, the other for low-demand data.

entry.title: Best Practices in Cloud Applications
entry.summary: Learn about some best practices for building cloud applications and how they align with the Azure Well-Architected Framework.

entry.title: SAP deployment in Azure using an Oracle database
entry.summary: Learn proven practices for running SAP on Oracle in Azure, with high availability.

entry.title: SAP HANA for Linux VMs in Scale-up Systems
entry.summary: Proven practices for running SAP HANA in a high-availability, scale-up environment that supports disaster recovery on Azure.

entry.title: Get Started with Analytics Architecture Design
entry.summary: Get an overview of Azure analytics technologies, guidance, solution ideas, and reference architectures.

entry.title: Connect an On-Premises Network to Azure by Using ExpressRoute with VPN Failover
entry.summary: Learn how to connect an on-premises network to an Azure virtual network by using ExpressRoute with a virtual private network (VPN) gateway failover.

entry.title: Architectural Approaches for Identity in Multitenant Solutions
entry.summary: This article covers identity management strategies for multitenant solutions, including authentication, authorization, federation, and security considerations.

entry.title: AKS for Amazon EKS Professionals
entry.summary: Learn about the AKS managed solution, configurations, best practices, and similarities and differences compared to Amazon EKS.

entry.title: Hub-Spoke Network Topology That Uses Azure Virtual WAN
entry.summary: Implement a hub-spoke topology with Azure Virtual WAN as the Microsoft-managed hub. Connect spoke virtual networks, branches, and remote users, and centrally inspect traffic with Azure Firewall.

entry.title: Hub-Spoke Network Topology in Azure
entry.summary: Learn about hub-spoke topology in Azure, where the spoke virtual networks connect to the hub virtual network and can connect to each other.

entry.title: Baseline Microsoft Foundry Chat Reference Architecture
entry.summary: Learn how to build network-secured, highly available, and zone-redundant enterprise chat applications by using Microsoft Foundry tools and Azure App Service.

entry.title: Modern Data Platform Architecture for SMBs
entry.summary: Use Microsoft Fabric and Azure Databricks to build a modern data platform architecture designed for small and medium businesses.

entry.title: Basic Microsoft Foundry Chat Reference Architecture
entry.summary: Establish foundational knowledge for how to build and deploy enterprise chat applications by using Microsoft Foundry and Azure App Service.

entry.title: Architectural Approaches for AI and Machine Learning in Multitenant Solutions
entry.summary: Learn approaches for AI and machine learning multitenancy, including tenant isolation, model training, inference, and how to use Foundry Tools.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA in Linux on Azure
entry.summary: Learn more about proven practices for running SAP S/4HANA effectively in a Linux environment on Azure with high availability.

entry.title: Compare AWS and Azure Networking Options
entry.summary: Compare the networking options of Azure and AWS. The comparisons cover cloud virtual networking, cross-premises connectivity, DNS management, and more.

entry.title: AI Agent Orchestration Patterns
entry.summary: Learn about fundamental orchestration patterns for AI agent architectures, including sequential, concurrent, group chat, handoff, and magentic patterns.

entry.title: Use Azure IoT Hub to Privately Upload Files to an Azure Storage Account
entry.summary: Learn how to use the Azure IoT Hub file upload feature to privately upload files to an Azure Storage account exposed through a firewall and custom domain.

entry.title: Deploy IBM Maximo Application Suite (MAS) on Azure
entry.summary: Learn how to run IBM Maximo Application Suite (MAS) on Azure. See guidance for designing and implementing cloud solutions with MAS 8.5 and up that use Azure.

entry.title: Scalable Cloud Applications and SRE
entry.summary: Build scalable cloud applications by using performance modeling and other principles and practices of site reliability engineering (SRE).

entry.title: Quantum computing integration with classical apps
entry.summary: Learn how to use Azure Quantum to implement hybrid quantum applications

entry.title: Guide to Private Link and DNS in Azure Virtual WAN
entry.summary: Learn how to implement DNS to support private endpoints in a Virtual WAN network. In these scenarios, every Virtual WAN hub has a firewall that has DNS proxy enabled.

entry.title: Single region scenario - Private Link and DNS in Azure Virtual WAN
entry.summary: This article provides guidance on implementing DNS to support private endpoints in a Virtual WAN network in a single region where the virtual hub has a Firewall with DNS Proxy enabled. The solution includes implementing a virtual WAN hub extension for DNS.

entry.title: Migrate IBM z/OS OLTP Workloads to Azure
entry.summary: Migrate a z/OS online transaction processing (OLTP) workload to an Azure application that is cost effective, responsive, scalable, and adaptable.

entry.title: Design a Hybrid Domain Name System (DNS) Solution by Using Azure
entry.summary: Learn how to design a hybrid Domain Name System (DNS) solution to resolve names for workloads that are hosted on-premises and in Microsoft Azure.

entry.title: Guidance for Using Azure Database for PostgreSQL in a Multitenant Solution
entry.summary: Learn about the Azure Database for PostgreSQL features that are useful when you work with multitenant systems. Explore guidance and examples.

entry.title: Choose an Azure Service for Vector Search
entry.summary: Learn how to use this information to decide which Azure service for vector search best suits your application.

entry.title: Deploy IBM Sterling Order Management Software (OMS) on Azure
entry.summary: Run IBM Sterling Order Management Software (OMS) on Azure. Design and implement cloud solutions for Sterling OMS that use Azure.

entry.title: Reliable Web App Pattern for Java
entry.summary: Implement the Reliable Web App pattern for Java. Get essential guidance for migrating web apps to the cloud. Learn how to replatform web apps.

entry.title: Azure Data Factory enterprise hardened architecture
entry.summary: Learn how to design an enterprise-hardened workload for Azure Data Factory in an Azure landing zone to build robust and efficient data pipelines.

entry.title: External Configuration Store Pattern
entry.summary: Review the External Configuration Store pattern, which moves configuration information out of the application deployment package to a centralized location.

entry.title: Move an IoT Hub-Based Solution to a Production Environment
entry.summary: Learn best practices for moving an IoT Hub-based solution to production, including deployment stamps, transient fault handling, and zero-touch provisioning.

entry.title: Get Started with Security Architecture Design
entry.summary: Get an overview of Azure security technologies and security architecture design, including solution ideas and reference architectures.

entry.title: Deployment Stamps Pattern
entry.summary: Learn about the Deployment Stamps pattern, which deploys many independent copies (known as stamps, service units, or scale units) of application components.

entry.title: DevSecOps on Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS)
entry.summary: Learn how DevSecOps helps you incorporate security best practices from the start of software development and throughout the software deployment life cycle (SDLC).

entry.title: Compensating Transaction Pattern
entry.summary: Use the Compensating Transaction pattern to undo work when a step of an eventually consistent operation fails in distributed systems.

entry.title: Choose a Microsoft Fabric Deployment Pattern
entry.summary: Evaluate four Microsoft Fabric deployment patterns to structure capacities, workspaces, and items based on your requirements.

entry.title: Azure Managed Redis Considerations for Multitenancy
entry.summary: Learn about Azure Managed Redis features, like Microsoft Entra ID authentication, active geo-replication, and Redis modules, that you can use to improve the performance of multitenant systems.

entry.title: Cross-tenant Secure Access to Apps by Using Private Endpoints
entry.summary: Restrict inbound traffic to a web app or function app. Use private endpoints in Azure to give consumer tenants secure access to provider tenant apps.

entry.title: Competing Consumers Pattern
entry.summary: Learn how the Competing Consumers pattern supports multiple concurrent consumers processing messages received on the same messaging channel.

entry.title: Sharding Pattern
entry.summary: Use the Sharding design pattern to divide a data store into horizontal partitions or shards to improve scalability and performance in distributed systems.

entry.title: Compute Resource Consolidation Pattern
entry.summary: Use the Compute Resource Consolidation design pattern to consolidate multiple tasks or operations into one computational unit.

entry.title: Choreography Pattern
entry.summary: Learn how to set up services to decide when and how to process a business operation, instead of depending on a central orchestrator.

entry.title: Get Started with Virtual Desktop Architecture Design
entry.summary: Get an overview of Azure virtual desktop technologies and cloud desktop design, including architecture guidance, solution ideas, and reference architectures.

entry.title: Image classification on Azure
entry.summary: Learn how to build image classification into your applications by using Azure services such as Azure AI Content Understanding and Azure Functions.

entry.title: Design a Hybrid Domain Name System (DNS) Solution by Using Azure
entry.summary: Learn how to design a hybrid Domain Name System (DNS) solution to resolve names for workloads that are hosted on-premises and in Microsoft Azure.

entry.title: Choose a Compute Option for Microservices
entry.summary: Choose an Azure compute platform for a microservices architecture. Compare options based on interservice communication, independent scaling, and deployability.

entry.title: Certificate Life Cycle Management on Azure
entry.summary: Learn how to create an infrastructure and workflow to automate the renewal process for certificates issued by a nonintegrated certification authority (CA).

entry.title: Event Sourcing Pattern
entry.summary: Learn how to use an append-only store to record the full series of events that describe actions taken on data in a domain.

entry.title: Basic Enterprise Integration on Azure
entry.summary: Learn how to implement a basic enterprise integration architecture on Azure by using Azure Logic Apps and Azure API Management.

entry.title: Hub-Spoke Network Topology in Azure
entry.summary: Learn about hub-spoke topology in Azure, where the spoke virtual networks connect to the hub virtual network and can connect to each other.

entry.title: Deploy Highly Available NVAs
entry.summary: Learn how to deploy network virtual appliances in high availability architectures for ingress and egress traffic in Azure.

entry.title: Multitier Web Application Built for High Availability and Disaster Recovery
entry.summary: Learn how to create a resilient multitier web application built for high availability and disaster recovery on Azure by using VMs.

entry.title: Access Foundry Models and Other Language Models Through a Gateway
entry.summary: Understand how implementing a gateway helps manage access to Azure OpenAI and other language models more securely and efficiently.

entry.title: Multitenancy and Azure Cosmos DB
entry.summary: Learn about Azure Cosmos DB features that you can use for multitenant systems. See more resources that explain how to use Azure Cosmos DB in a multitenant solution.

entry.title: Real-Time Analytics with Azure Service Bus and Microsoft Fabric
entry.summary: Learn how to use Microsoft Fabric with Azure Service Bus for near real-time solutions at enterprise scale in production environments.

entry.title: Extract and Analyze Call Center Data by Using Azure OpenAI, Speech Services, and Language Services
entry.summary: Learn how to extract insights from customer conversations at a call center by using Foundry Tools and Azure OpenAI.

entry.title: Use a Split-Brain DNS Configuration to Host a Web App
entry.summary: Implement a split-brain DNS configuration to differentiate traffic treatment based on DNS and whether a client originates from the internet or a corporate network.

entry.title: Run a Windows VM on Azure
entry.summary: Learn the best practices for running a Windows virtual machine on Azure, which requires some additional components, including networking and storage resources.

entry.title: Run a Linux VM on Azure
entry.summary: Learn the best practices for running a Linux virtual machine on Azure, which requires some additional components, including networking and storage resources.

entry.title: Architectural Approaches for AI and Machine Learning in Multitenant Solutions
entry.summary: Learn approaches for AI and machine learning multitenancy, including tenant isolation, model training, inference, and how to use Foundry Tools.

entry.title: Azure for Google Cloud professionals
entry.summary: Learn the basics of Microsoft Azure accounts, platform, and services, and key similarities and differences between the Google Cloud and Azure platforms.

entry.title: AKS triage—Container registry connectivity
entry.summary: Learn about verifying the connection to a container registry. This step is part of the triage practice for Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) clusters.

entry.title: Compare AWS and Azure Accounts
entry.summary: Learn the differences between Azure and AWS accounts and subscriptions. Understand the types of administrator accounts in Azure.

entry.title: Choose a Kubernetes at the Edge Compute Option
entry.summary: Learn about trade-offs and considerations for various Kubernetes options available for extending compute on the edge.

entry.title: Azure Sandbox
entry.summary: Accelerate your Azure project by using a fully functional sandbox environment that includes virtual networks, virtual machines, and databases.

entry.title: Manage Virtual Machine Compliance
entry.summary: Manage virtual machine compliance without disrupting DevOps practices. Use Azure VM Image Builder and Azure Compute Gallery to minimize risk from system images.

entry.title: Azure Load Testing with Custom Plugins for Event Hubs and IoT Hub to Simulate Device Behaviors
entry.summary: Learn how to design KPIs and develop a dashboard for Azure Load Testing with custom JMeter plugins to simulate device behaviors.

entry.title: Choose a Natural Language Processing Technology
entry.summary: Choose a natural language processing technology for sentiment analysis, topic and language detection, key phrase extraction, and document categorization.

entry.title: What Is a Data Lake?
entry.summary: Learn about the advantages of using data lake storage repositories, which can store terabytes and petabytes of data in its native, raw format.

entry.title: Asynchronous Request-Reply Pattern
entry.summary: Learn how to decouple back-end processing from front-end hosts by using asynchronous operations and HTTP polling for long-running tasks.

entry.title: Windows 365 Azure Network Connection
entry.summary: Design and implement Windows 365 Azure network connections to integrate Cloud PCs with your existing network infrastructure and on-premises resources.

entry.title: Technology Choices for Azure Solutions
entry.summary: Learn where to find Azure technology guidance across compute, data, analytics, networking, and AI by using curated comparison and choice resources.

entry.title: Migrate from Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service to Azure Kubernetes Service
entry.summary: Learn how to migrate stateless and stateful workloads from Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (EKS) to Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS).

entry.title: Baseline Architecture for an AKS Cluster
entry.summary: Learn about the reference architecture for the recommended baseline infrastructure that deploys an Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) cluster.

entry.title: Conceptual planning for IPv6 networking
entry.summary: Learn strategies for transitioning an IPv4 network environment on Azure to IPv6. IPv6 provides a larger pool of internet addresses to accommodate growth.

entry.title: Computer Forensics Chain of Custody in Azure
entry.summary: Learn how to create an infrastructure and workflow to help ensure a valid digital evidence chain of custody (CoC) for computer forensics in Azure.

entry.title: Rehost Adabas and Natural Applications on Azure
entry.summary: Learn how to migrate a Software AG Adabas and Natural mainframe system to Azure by using a rehost approach with minimal changes to your existing workload.

entry.title: Google Cloud to Azure Services Comparison
entry.summary: Compare Google Cloud and Microsoft Azure services. Not every Google Cloud service or Azure service is listed, and not every matched service has exact feature parity.

entry.title: Migrate Mainframe Data Tier to Azure with mLogica LIBER*IRIS
entry.summary: Learn how mLogica LIBER*IRIS provides a proven solution for bulk data migration from a mainframe to Azure for enterprise workloads.

entry.title: Baseline Microsoft Foundry Chat Reference Architecture
entry.summary: Learn how to build network-secured, highly available, and zone-redundant enterprise chat applications by using Microsoft Foundry tools and Azure App Service.

entry.title: Basic Microsoft Foundry Chat Reference Architecture
entry.summary: Establish foundational knowledge for how to build and deploy enterprise chat applications by using Microsoft Foundry and Azure App Service.

entry.title: AKS for Amazon EKS Professionals
entry.summary: Learn about the AKS managed solution, configurations, best practices, and similarities and differences compared to Amazon EKS.

entry.title: Storage Options for a Kubernetes Cluster
entry.summary: Understand storage options for a Kubernetes cluster, and compare Amazon EKS and Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) storage options.

entry.title: Create a Modern Analytics Architecture by Using Azure Databricks
entry.summary: Learn how to create a modern analytics architecture by using Azure Databricks and Data Lake Storage. Unify data, analytics, and AI workloads at any scale.

entry.title: Get Started with Storage Architecture Design
entry.summary: Get started with Azure storage architecture design by comparing storage service types, reviewing reference architectures, and applying readiness guidance.

entry.title: Design Patterns for Microservices
entry.summary: Learn about design patterns that address common microservices challenges like data consistency, cross-service communication, failure isolation, and legacy integration.

entry.title: Event Sourcing Pattern
entry.summary: Learn how to use an append-only store to record the full series of events that describe actions taken on data in a domain.

entry.title: Get Started with Database Architecture Design
entry.summary: Learn about database architecture design on Azure, including technology choices, solution ideas, and reference architectures for your workloads.

entry.title: Multiregion BCDR for Azure Virtual Desktop
entry.summary: Learn about the possible options and scenarios so that you can design and implement an effective multiregion BCDR strategy for Azure Virtual Desktop.

entry.title: Run SAP NetWeaver in Windows on Azure
entry.summary: Learn proven practices for running SAP NetWeaver in a Windows environment on Azure to achieve high availability and disaster recovery.

entry.title: Ambassador Pattern
entry.summary: Learn about the ambassador pattern, which creates helper services that send network requests on behalf of a consumer service or application.

entry.title: Set Up Real-Time Sync of MongoDB Atlas Data Changes to Microsoft Fabric
entry.summary: Learn how to integrate MongoDB Atlas with Microsoft Fabric by using open mirroring to keep data tables in sync with operational data changes.

entry.title: Bulkhead Pattern
entry.summary: Learn about the Bulkhead pattern, which isolates elements of an application into pools so that if one fails, the others continue to function.

entry.title: Get Started with Compute Architecture Design
entry.summary: Learn about Azure compute technologies, from virtual machines to serverless functions. Review guidance, solution ideas, and reference architectures.

entry.title: Multiregion Load Balancing
entry.summary: Learn how to build an Azure system that serves web and non-web workloads with resilient multitier applications in multiple Azure regions.

entry.title: Asynchronous Request-Reply Pattern
entry.summary: Learn how to decouple back-end processing from front-end hosts by using asynchronous operations and HTTP polling for long-running tasks.

entry.title: Publisher-Subscriber Pattern
entry.summary: Use an intermediary message broker or event bus to decouple senders from consumers and distribute messages to interested subscribers asynchronously.

entry.title: Host Name Preservation
entry.summary: Learn how to preserve the original HTTP host name between a reverse proxy and its back-end web application in common Azure services.

entry.title: Migrate a Web App by Using Azure API Management
entry.summary: Review an example scenario in which an e-commerce company in the travel industry uses Azure API Management to migrate a legacy web application.

entry.title: Scalable Cloud Applications and SRE
entry.summary: Build scalable cloud applications by using performance modeling and other principles and practices of site reliability engineering (SRE).

entry.title: High-volume batch transaction processing
entry.summary: Use Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) and Azure Service Bus to implement high-volume batch transaction processing.

entry.title: Azure DNS Private Resolver
entry.summary: Learn how to use Azure DNS Private Resolver to simplify hybrid recursive Domain Name System (DNS) resolution for on-premises and Azure workloads.

entry.title: Esri ArcGIS Platform on Azure Virtual Desktop
entry.summary: View a reference architecture that shows how to deploy ArcGIS Pro in Azure Virtual Desktop to support the hyperscale of Azure.

entry.title: Real-Time Analytics with Azure Service Bus and Microsoft Fabric
entry.summary: Learn how to use Microsoft Fabric with Azure Service Bus for near real-time solutions at enterprise scale in production environments.

entry.title: Azure Virtual Desktop for Azure Local
entry.summary: Learn how to design Azure Virtual Desktop for Azure Local to provide a more secure and productive remote desktop experience for users.

entry.title: AKS Day-2 Guide - Patch and Upgrade Guidance
entry.summary: Learn about day-2 patching and upgrading practices for Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) worker nodes and Kubernetes versions.

entry.title: Best Practices for Background Jobs
entry.summary: Learn best practices for designing background jobs on Azure, including hosting options, reliability, and scaling for event-driven and scheduled jobs.

entry.title: Azure AI Video Processing Guide
entry.summary: Learn about Foundry Tools for video processing and video generation. Understand and compare each service's capabilities and use cases.

entry.title: Choose an Azure Speech Recognition and Generation Technology
entry.summary: Learn about speech recognition and generation capabilities in Foundry Tools, including speech-to-text, text-to-speech, speech translation, and avatar creation.

entry.title: Choose an Azure AI Targeted Language Processing Technology
entry.summary: Learn about targeted language processing capabilities in Foundry Tools, including natural language processing, text analytics, translation, and document data extraction.

entry.title: Choose an Azure AI Technology
entry.summary: Learn about AI services that you can use in AI applications and data flows. Choose the appropriate service for your use case.

entry.title: AKS Backup and Recovery
entry.summary: Learn how to back up and recover AKS clusters and their workloads to protect data, maintain availability, and support disaster recovery.

entry.title: Best Practices in Cloud Applications
entry.summary: Learn about some best practices for building cloud applications and how they align with the Azure Well-Architected Framework.

entry.title: Azure Enterprise Cloud File Share
entry.summary: Learn about an enterprise-level cloud file sharing solution that uses Azure Files, Azure File Sync, Azure private DNS, and Azure private endpoints.

entry.title: Event-Driven Architecture Style
entry.summary: Explore the benefits, challenges, and best practices for event-driven architectures on Azure.

entry.title: Run a Linux VM on Azure
entry.summary: Learn the best practices for running a Linux virtual machine on Azure, which requires some additional components, including networking and storage resources.

entry.title: Choose an Azure storage service
entry.summary: Use this guide to decide which Azure storage service best suits your application.

entry.title: Prepare to Choose a Data Store in Azure
entry.summary: Learn how to choose the right Azure data store for your workloads by evaluating functional, performance, cost, and security requirements.

entry.title: Use Azure Firewall to help protect an AKS cluster
entry.summary: Deploy an AKS cluster in a hub-and-spoke network topology by using Terraform and Azure DevOps. Help protect inbound and outbound traffic by using Azure Firewall.

entry.title: Guidance for using Azure Private Link service in a multitenant solution
entry.summary: This article describes the features of Azure Private Link that are useful when you work with multitenanted systems, and it provides links to guidance and examples.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA in Linux on Azure
entry.summary: Learn more about proven practices for running SAP S/4HANA effectively in a Linux environment on Azure with high availability.

entry.title: No-Caching antipattern
entry.summary: Learn about ways to mitigate the No-Caching antipattern, the common design flaw of repeatedly fetching the same data.

entry.title: CDN guidance
entry.summary: Guidance on using Content Delivery Networks (CDNs) to deliver high-bandwidth content hosted in Azure.

entry.title: Data partitioning guidance
entry.summary: View guidance for how to separate data partitions to be managed and accessed separately. Understand horizontal, vertical, and functional partitioning strategies.

entry.title: Data partitioning strategies
entry.summary: View guidance on separating data partitions to be managed and accessed separately in different services, such as Azure AI Search, Azure storage queues, and more.

entry.title: Administer SQL Server with Azure Arc
entry.summary: Learn how to use Azure Arc for management, maintenance, and monitoring of SQL Server instances in on-premises and multicloud environments.

entry.title: Azure API Management Landing Zone Architecture
entry.summary: Learn about a secure enterprise API management architecture that uses Azure Application Gateway, API Management, and CI/CD pipeline deployment.

entry.title: Enhanced-security hybrid messaging for client access
entry.summary: Enhance your security in a client access scenario by using Microsoft Entra multifactor authentication.

entry.title: Enhanced-security hybrid messaging for mobile access
entry.summary: Enhance your security in a mobile access scenario by using Microsoft Entra multifactor authentication.

entry.title: Identity architecture design
entry.summary: Control access to your apps and data by designing and implementing an identity solution. See resources with guidelines, best practices, and recommendations.
